note: SEEDED KNOWN-BAD (P3, Constitution Rule 12 gate 1, caution.md C-147). An adjudicator model returns a well-formed JSON verdict that cites source_id 'S9' - an authority that was NEVER in the injected retrieval set (allowedSourceIds = S1, S2). This is the hallucinated-citation class: 13-21% of legal citations across five commercial systems were fabricated (arXiv 2606.00898). llm/gate.js validateResponse() must HARD-REJECT it with an out_of_set_source_id violation (retrieval-gated emission). The schema is valid and there is no quote, so ONLY gate 1 can catch this: if the retrieval gate is removed, nothing else fires and the calibration correctly fails. Run: node llm/gate.js --calibrate. A finding is emitted only when the poison is refused; zero findings fails eval/calibration-known-bad/run.js (earn-your-zero).

sources.S1: This privacy notice explains how we handle the personal data you provide when you contact our team.
sources.S2: We store enquiry details for as long as needed to answer your question and then delete them.
